  "findings": [
    "Insufficient anchor bolt projection above the nut",
    "Non-compliance with API RP 686 minimum thread projection requirements"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Halt installation and grouting activities",
    "Verify actual thread engagement and projection against OEM and API RP 686 standards",
    "Implement corrective action such as replacing anchor bolts, using coupling nuts if engineered, or lowering the baseplate if elevation tolerances permit"
  ],
  "rationale": "API RP 686 requires a minimum anchor bolt projection (typically at least 1.5 threads or 1/8 inch beyond the top of the fully engaged nut). Insufficient projection indicates inadequate thread engagement, which compromises the structural integrity of the machinery hold-down under operating loads. Work cannot proceed to final torqueing or grouting until this defect is corrected.",
  "references": [
    "API RP 686 Chapter 4"
  ]
}
